name: DeepMind
category: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) Research and Development
overview_text: DeepMind is an artificial intelligence (AI) research organization that specializes in developing and applying general-purpose learning algorithms to simulate the human brain. The organization focuses on solving complex challenges in fields such as climate change, healthcare, and education.

4 Barrow St.
London WC1X 0PB

industry: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) Research and Development
description: DeepMind is an artificial intelligence (AI) research organization that specializes in developing and applying general-purpose learning algorithms to simulate the human brain. The organization focuses on solving complex challenges in fields such as climate change, healthcare, and education.
vision_statement: To solve intelligence and make it accessible to everyone.
mission_statement: To advance the state of the art in AI and to make a positive impact on society.
sales_motion: DeepMind's sales motion is focused on building long-term partnerships with organizations to develop and deploy AI solutions.
customer_lifetime_value: Varies by customer and use case, but can be in the millions of dollars
customer_concentration_risk: Low, as DeepMind has a diverse customer base across various industries
carbon_footprint: DeepMind's carbon footprint is not publicly disclosed, but the company has committed to reducing its carbon emissions
ethical_sourcing: DeepMind sources its hardware and software from a variety of suppliers, with a focus on sustainability and ethics
benchmark_vs_peers: DeepMind is a leader in the AI research and development space, with numerous publications and awards
industry_associations: DeepMind is a member of the Partnership on AI, a coalition of companies working to advance the development of AI
